items.name: audio-types
items.title: Audio Types
items.description: TypeScript type definitions for audx audio assets.

items.name: use-audio
items.title: useAudio
items.description: A lightweight React hook for playing UI audio effects using the Web Audio API. Zero dependencies.

items.name: audio-engine
items.title: Audio Engine
items.description: Framework-agnostic audio engine using Web Audio API. Zero dependencies.

items.name: back-001
items.title: Back 001
items.description: A very quick, subtle sound effect suitable for navigating back in a UI or undoing a simple action.
items.author: Kenney <https://kenney.nl>

items.name: click-001
items.title: Click 001
items.description: A very short, high-pitched click sound, ideal for a light, responsive button press or a subtle interactive element.
items.author: Kenney <https://kenney.nl>

items.name: scroll-001
items.title: Scroll 001
items.description: A smooth, continuous scrolling sound effect, ideal for indicating content navigation, a list moving, or a wheel spinning within a UI.
items.author: Kenney <https://kenney.nl>
